notes:
• The chronology builds itself: every dated exhibit becomes a timeline event automatically (⌥⌘T), and the view refreshes whenever it regains focus.
• Statement of Facts: tick the relevant events, click Statement of Facts… — narrative sentences (“On 5 May 2020, … (Exhibit C-1).”) or a plain dated list, into Word or the clipboard. You are asked first.
• Export CSV and Copy respect the ticked selection.
